data.title: The Merchant's Table
data.metaDescription: The Merchant’s Table is a homeware shop in Woodbridge, Suffolk. We host events and workshops, bringing exceptional independent Suffolk and London producers, makers and artists together in one place to sell their wares and skills. We stock principled makers’ products which have enduring value.
data.ogDescription: The Merchant’s Table is a homeware shop in Woodbridge, Suffolk. We host events and workshops, bringing exceptional independent Suffolk and London producers, makers and artists together in one place to sell their wares and skills. We stock principled makers’ products which have enduring value.

issues.impact: You're not using the full space Google gives you in search results.
issues.fix: Expand to 50-60 characters with more descriptive, keyword-rich content

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Multiple H1s confuse search engines about your page's main topic.
issues.fix: Use only one H1 per page. Use H2-H6 for subheadings.

summary: We analyzed themerchantstable.co.uk and found 3 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
